name: Sysmon Configuration Error
description: 检测 Sysmon 配置更新阶段的关键错误消息，可能导致日志能力受影响。
pattern: Failed to open service configuration with error|Failed to connect to the driver to update configuration

name: Windows Service Terminated With Error
description: 检测 Service Control Manager 记录的服务错误终止事件。

name: Important Windows Service Terminated With Error
description: 检测关键安全相关服务错误终止。
pattern: EventID\s*[:=]\s7023.*(Antivirus|Firewall|Application Guard|BitLocker Drive Encryption Service|Encrypting File System|Microsoft Defender|Threat Protection|Windows Event Log|windefend|mpssvc|Sense|EventLog|BDESVC|EFS)

name: Important Windows Service Terminated Unexpectedly
description: 检测关键服务意外终止，当前规则重点是 Message Queuing / MSMQ。

name: Windows Update Error
description: 检测 Windows 更新相关错误。

name: Crash Dump Created By Operating System
description: 检测系统级崩溃后生成 dump 的事件。

name: Sysmon Application Crashed
description: 检测 Sysmon 进程崩溃提示。
pattern: Provider_Name\s*[:=]\sApplication Popup.*EventID\s*[:=]\s26.*(sysmon64\.exe - Application Error|sysmon\.exe - Application Error)|sysmon(64)?\.exe - Application Error

name: DHCP Server Failed Loading CallOut DLL
description: 检测 DHCP 服务加载 CallOut DLL 失败。

name: DNS Server Failed Loading ServerLevelPluginDLL
description: 检测 DNS 服务器插件 DLL 加载失败。

name: Failed DNS Zone Transfer
description: 检测 DNS 区域传送失败。
pattern: EventID\s*[:=]\s6004|zone transfer failed|non-existent or non-authoritative zone

name: Windows Defender Firewall Failed To Load Group Policy
description: 检测 Windows Defender Firewall 服务加载组策略失败。
pattern: EventID\s*[:=]\s2009|Windows Defender Firewall service failed to load Group Policy

name: Windows Defender Real-Time Protection Failure Restart
description: 检测 Defender 实时防护错误或异常重启。
pattern: EventID\s*[:=]\s(3002|3007)|Real-Time Protection feature has encountered an error and failed|Real-time Protection feature has restarted

name: Microsoft Malware Protection Engine Crash
description: 检测 MsMpEng.exe 与 mpengine.dll 相关的应用崩溃。

name: Microsoft Malware Protection Engine Crash WER
description: 检测 WER 侧记录的 MsMpEng / mpengine 崩溃事件。

name: LSASS Process Crashed Application
description: 检测 LSASS 崩溃事件。

name: Suspicious OpenSSH Daemon Error
description: 检测 SSHD 中典型致命错误模式。
pattern: unexpected internal error|unknown or unsupported key type|invalid certificate signing key|invalid elliptic curve value|incorrect signature|error in libcrypto|unexpected bytes remain after decoding|fatal: buffer_get_string: bad string|Local: crc32 compensation attack|bad client public DH value|Corrupted MAC on input

name: Suspicious VSFTPD Error Messages
description: 检测 VSFTPD 的异常或致命错误模式。
pattern: Connection refused: too many sessions for this address\.|Connection refused: tcp_wrappers denial\.|Bad HTTP verb\.|port and pasv both active|pasv and port both active|Transfer done \(but failed to open directory\)\.|Could not set file modification time\.|bug: pid active in ptrace_sandbox_free|PTRACE_SETOPTIONS failure|weird status:|couldn't handle sandbox event|syscall .* out of bounds|syscall not permitted:|syscall validate failed:|Input line too long\.|poor buffer accounting in str_netfd_alloc|vsf_sysutil_read_loop

name: Suspicious Named Error
description: 检测 named DNS 服务中的关键错误模式。
pattern: dropping source port zero packet from|denied AXFR from|exiting \(due to fatal error\)

name: Spring Framework Exceptions
description: 检测 Spring 安全相关异常，常见于恶意请求触发的框架异常路径。

name: Django Framework Exceptions
description: 检测 Django 的安全相关异常，如 SuspiciousOperation 及其子类。

name: Ruby on Rails Framework Exceptions
description: 检测 Ruby on Rails 控制器层异常，常用于识别异常输入或利用探测。

name: Python SQL Exceptions
description: 检测 Python DB-API 常见 SQL 异常类型。

name: Suspicious SQL Error Messages
description: 检测 SQL 注入探测常见错误信息。
pattern: quoted string not properly terminated|You have an error in your SQL syntax|Unclosed quotation mark|near \".*\": syntax error|SELECTs to the left and right of UNION do not have the same number of result columns

name: JVM Process Execution Error
description: 检测 JVM 应用中与进程执行相关的异常，可能关联命令执行风险。

name: NodeJS Child Process Execution Error
description: 检测 NodeJS child_process 相关错误，可能指向 RCE 触发路径。

name: Velocity Template Renderer Exceptions
description: 检测 Velocity 模板引擎异常，可能与服务端模板注入相关。

name: Bitbucket User Login Failure
description: 检测 Bitbucket 审计日志中的用户登录失败事件。

name: Bitbucket User Login Failure Via SSH
description: 检测 Bitbucket 审计日志中的 SSH 登录失败事件。

name: Nginx Worker Process Core Dump
description: 检测 Nginx 工作进程崩溃并生成 core dump。

name: Apache Threading Error
description: 检测 Apache 日志中出现线程优先级相关断言错误。

name: Apache Worker Process Segmentation Fault
description: 检测 Apache 工作进程因段错误崩溃。

name: MSSQL Server Failed Logon
description: 检测客户端连接 MSSQL 服务器时的认证失败事件。

name: MSSQL Server Failed Logon From External Network
description: 检测来自外部网络 IP 对 MSSQL 服务器的认证失败。

name: Failed MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
description: 检测 Microsoft Exchange Transport Agent 安装失败事件。

name: AppX Package Deployment Failed Signing Requirements
description: 检测 AppX 包因不满足签名要求而部署失败。
